top_signals.title: Gold and Silver Rise on Dip-Buying as Traders Weigh Fed Strategy
top_signals.summary: Gold and silver advanced on dip-buying as traders monitored Middle East tensions for signs that higher energy costs could stoke inflation, putting pressure on the Federal Reserve to tighten policy.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.
